---
title: "The Statistical Power of Alcohol Consumption Measures"
date: 2025-05-12
author:
  - name: Cormac Monaghan
    url: https://c-monaghan.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0001-9012-3060
    affiliation:
      - Hamilton Institute, Maynooth University, Ireland
      - Department of Psychology, Maynooth University, Ireland
  - name: Rafael de Andrade Moral
    url: https://rafamoral.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0002-0875-3563
    affiliation:
      - Department of Mathematics and Statistics, Maynooth University, Ireland
  - name: Joanna McHugh Power
    orcid: 0000-0002-7387-3107
    affiliation:
      - Department of Psychology, Maynooth University, Ireland
categories:
  - simulation
  - generalised linear models
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Monaghan, C</strong>, <a href="https://rafamoral.github.io/">de Andrade Moral, R</a>, & <a href="https://www.maynoothuniversity.ie/people/joanna-mchugh-power">McHugh Power, J</a>. (2025). <em>The Statistical Power of Alcohol Consumption Measures</em> [Poster Session]. 45th Conference on Applied Statistics in Ireland. Galway, Ireland.
  links:
    - name: Poster
      url: ./files/CASI_2025.pdf
      local: true
      icon: fa-solid fa-file-image
    - name: Github Repository
      url: https://github.com/C-Monaghan/CASI-2025
      icon: fa-brands fa-github
---

## Important links

- [Conference poster](./files/CASI_2025.pdf)
